original_image_tags: A single, dark, typewritten page with two hole punches on the left margin. The text is slightly faded and uneven, characteristic of a carbon copy or early photocopy. There is a handwritten annotation in the upper right corner that appears to read "10/1".

elements.description: A typed document page with several paragraphs of text separated by dashed lines. There are two hole-punch marks on the left margin and one in the top right corner. The text describes an explosion event witnessed by Edgar Young near Norcatur, a reference to a similar event in Eastern Kansas, and a note about a burned flashlight battery in Norton. A final note states that a copy of Exhibit "C" was not received.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page contains only typed text with no distinct visual content (photographs, sketches, etc.), differing only in describing general page layout and textual summary.
